rules.name: Announce at Start
rules.description: 检查是否有 Announce at start 提示
rules.fix_template: **Announce at start:** "我正在使用 {skill_name} skill 来帮你..."

rules.name: Metadata 完整性
rules.description: 检查 metadata 配置是否完整（license, author, version 等）
rules.fix_template:
license: MIT
metadata:
  author: Your Team
  version: "1.0.0"
  domain: your-domain
  role: your-role
  scope: your-scope
  output-format: markdown

rules.name: Overview 部分
rules.description: 检查是否有 Overview 部分
rules.fix_template:
## Overview

使用此 skill 来...

**Announce at start:** "我正在使用 {skill_name} skill 来帮你..."
